message:
perf: relax atomic orderings, eliminate scheduler allocations, consolidate Cx clone

- symbol_cancel: SeqCst → Acquire/Release for is_cancelled/cancel/cancelled_at
  (monotone flag + RwLock provides sufficient happens-before)
- notify: SeqCst → Release/Acquire for stored_notifications and generation
  (producer Release pairs with consumer Acquire on same variable)
- scheduler priority: drain().filter().collect() → retain() for remove() and
  move_to_cancel_lane (eliminates 3 heap allocations per removal)
- cx: group 11 handle fields behind Arc<CxHandles> reducing Cx::clone() from
  ~15 Arc refcount ops to 3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
